chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 445 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on MA 10146/2025. 25.11.2025. Mr. Junaid Jabbar, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State. = Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel submits that vide Order dated 29.08.2025 the applicant/accused was granted protective bail by this Court for a period of fifteen days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, applicant / accused surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated period and after full dressed trial he was acquitted of the charge by the trial Court vide judgment dated 17.10.2025, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice and after going through the record, tendered her no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
